message:
fix(gateway/agent): improve spawn error handling and DB sync

## Spawn Reliability
- Track spawned flag to know if cleanup is needed on failure
- On spawn failure after driver.spawn succeeds, terminate the orphaned
  agent and remove from registry before re-throwing error
- Update agent status in DB after successful spawn (ready state)

## Database Synchronization
- Sync lifecycle state changes to database for persistence
- Add status update queries after state transitions

Note: Contains duplicate status update that should be cleaned up in
subsequent refactoring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
